inputs.label: Number of Drywall Sheets
inputs.businessContext: Total number of drywall sheets to be taped and finished.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of drywall sheets to be taped and finished.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bantlanacak ve son kat yapılacak toplam alçıpan levha sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Trockenbauplatten, die tapeziert und verspachtelt werden müssen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de plaques de plâtre à bander et à finir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de placas de yeso a cintar y enlucir.

inputs.label: Average Joint Length per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Average linear length of joints per sheet (including butt and tapered joints).

label_i18n.fr: Longueur moyenne des joints par plaque
label_i18n.es: Longitud media de junta por placa

businessContext_i18n.en: Average linear length of joints per sheet (including butt and tapered joints).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Levha başına ortalama doğrusal derz uzunluğu (alın derzleri ve konik derzler dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche lineare Länge der Fugen pro Platte (einschließlich Stoß- und Schrägfugen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur linéaire moyenne des joints par plaque (y compris les joints aboutés et coniques).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud lineal media de las juntas por placa (incluyendo juntas a tope y cónicas).

inputs.label: Joint Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the joint compound application area across the joint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the joint compound application area across the joint.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des Spachtelmasse-Auftragsbereichs entlang der Fuge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la zone d'application de l'enduit sur le joint.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del área de aplicación del compuesto para juntas a lo largo de la junta.

inputs.label: Compound Thickness per Coat
inputs.businessContext: Applied wet thickness of joint compound per coat.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applied wet thickness of joint compound per coat.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kat başına uygulanan ıslak derz bileşiği kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufgetragene Nassdicke der Spachtelmasse pro Schicht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur humide appliquée de l'enduit par couche.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor húmedo aplicado del compuesto para juntas por capa.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of coats applied (e.g., tape coat, fill coat, finish coat).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of coats applied (e.g., tape coat, fill coat, finish coat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufgetragenen Schichten (z. B. Einbettungsschicht, Füllschicht, Deckschicht).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de couches appliquées (par exemple, couche de bande, couche de remplissage, couche de finition).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de capas aplicadas (p. ej., capa de cinta, capa de relleno, capa de acabado).

inputs.label: Coverage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer-specified coverage rate per mm thickness per kg of compound.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer-specified coverage rate per mm thickness per kg of compound.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici tarafından belirtilen, mm kalınlık başına kg bileşik başına kaplama oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Hersteller angegebene Ergiebigkeit pro mm Dicke pro kg Spachtelmasse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de couverture spécifié par le fabricant par mm d'épaisseur par kg d'enduit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de cobertura especificada por el fabricante por mm de espesor por kg de compuesto.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
